Package simpaths.model.decisions

Class CESUtility

java.lang.Object
simpaths.model.decisions.CESUtility
All Implemented Interfaces:
IEvaluation
public class CESUtility extends Object implements IEvaluation
CLASS TO MANAGE EVALUATION OF NESTED CES INTERTEMPORAL UTILITY FUNCTION

    • evaluate

      public double evaluate(double[] args)
      METHOD TO EVALUATE EXPECTED LIFETIME UTILITY
      Specified by:
      evaluate in interface IEvaluation
      Parameters:
      args - arguments of utility function
      Returns:
      expected lifetime utility, assuming optimising behaviour in the future
